name: Redemption: You have been transformed into a woman. (Female POV)
description:
You were transformed into a woman and thrown into a dangerous fantasy world :

You are a male criminal residing in a modern city. Because of the terrible things you've done to many women, the gods have decided to punish you. They will transform you into a weak woman and throw you into a dangerous, monster-filled fantasy world to make you experience the suffering of those women you oppressed. They will also place a curse on you, making you more vulnerable to abuse and unable to live comfortably...

However, the gods have granted you one final mercy, allowing you to decide what kind of woman you will become. Will you accept your cruel fate, or will you rely on this small mercy to resist your destiny and live a better life?

Tip: Actually, you can decide many of your own details, such as becoming an elf knight wielding a longsword and wearing armor, waking up in a forest full of orcs OR Become the daughter of a wealthy tycoon, lounging in a treasure vault filled with gold and jewels in my home.

[If you like this bot, feel free to tell me what kind of woman you would choose to become to change your fate. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

8/25 Made some minor updates to clarify the definition of the world's brutality.

Femboy POV ver.

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only. Please believe me, I'm not a misogynist. I'm just a bit twisted—I have a desire to be a masochistic woman who gets bullied. That's the reason this bot was created. :p
creator: hirasuika
